userStories.title: Home screen stats header (streak + workouts this week)
userStories.notes: Use axios instance from services/api.ts. Follow pattern from existing screens.

userStories.title: Home screen last session widget
acceptanceCriteria: Widget shows last workout session (name, date, duration)
Shows 'No recent workout' state if empty
Tappable → navigates to workout detail (placeholder for now)
userStories.notes: Create a RecentSessionCard component in components/home/

userStories.title: Home screen next workout widget
acceptanceCriteria: Widget shows next scheduled workout if any
Shows 'Start a workout' CTA if nothing scheduled
userStories.notes: Create NextWorkoutCard component in components/home/

userStories.title: Home screen weight/goals progress widget
acceptanceCriteria: Widget shows current weight vs goal weight
userStories.notes: Create ProgressWidget component. Use accent color #EFBF04 for progress bar.

userStories.title: Programs list screen
acceptanceCriteria: Each card: program name, days/week, duration
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/WorkoutScreen.tsx and app/screens/ProgramDetailScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Program detail screen with exercises
acceptanceCriteria: ProgramDetailScreen shows program info + list of exercises per day
Start Session button → navigates to ActiveSessionScreen
userStories.notes: Group exercises by day. Create ExerciseCard component.

userStories.title: Active workout session screen (without timer)
acceptanceCriteria: ActiveSessionScreen shows current exercise, sets, reps
PATCH to update as exercises completed
userStories.notes: This is the core workout screen. Timer added separately in US-008.

userStories.title: Rest timer in active session (countdown per set)
acceptanceCriteria: Countdown timer starts automatically after completing a set
Visual countdown with NativeWind progress indicator
userStories.notes: Use React state + useEffect for local timer first. Foreground service added in US-009.

userStories.title: Foreground notification with active timer
acceptanceCriteria: When session is active, persistent notification shows current exercise + timer
userStories.notes: CRITICAL FEATURE. Use expo-task-manager defineTask + expo-notifications. Check context7 docs for Expo Notifications and Task Manager before implementing. Requires expo-dev-client (not Expo Go).

userStories.title: Session summary screen
acceptanceCriteria: PostSessionScreen shows: duration, exercises completed, sets done, PRs
Save session button → PATCH /api/workout-sessions/:id with completion
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/PostSessionScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Exercises catalog screen
acceptanceCriteria: ExercisesScreen shows list of all exercises
Search bar to filter by name
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/ExercisesScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Exercise filter by muscle group
acceptanceCriteria: Filter chips for muscle groups (chest, back, legs, arms, shoulders, core)
userStories.notes: Add filter state to ExercisesScreen or custom useExerciseFilter hook

userStories.title: Exercise detail screen
acceptanceCriteria: ExerciseDetailScreen shows: name, muscle groups, instructions, tips
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/ExerciseDetailScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Workout history screen
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/HistoryScreen.tsx. Add to Workout tab or Profile tab.

userStories.title: Articles list screen (Learn tab)
acceptanceCriteria: Each card: title, category, read time
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/LearnScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Article reader screen
userStories.notes: Use ScrollView. Content may be HTML/markdown — use a RN markdown renderer if needed.

userStories.title: Quiz screen
acceptanceCriteria: QuizScreen shows quiz questions one by one
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/QuizScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Profile screen
acceptanceCriteria: ProfileScreen shows user info (name, avatar, subscription status)
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Edit profile screen
acceptanceCriteria: EditProfileScreen has form: name, weight, height, goal
userStories.notes: Reuse form pattern from Register screen

userStories.title: Notification settings screen
acceptanceCriteria: NotificationSettingsScreen has toggles: workout reminders, rest day reminders
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/NotificationSettingsScreen.tsx

userStories.title: Settings screen (logout + app info)
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsScreen has: logout button, app version, account deletion option
Logout clears JWT from SecureStore and redirects to AuthNavigator
userStories.notes: Create app/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx. Use AuthContext to trigger logout.

userStories.title: LemonSqueezy subscription WebView
acceptanceCriteria: PaywallScreen shows subscription plans (Free / Premium / Premium+)
Tapping a plan opens WebView with LemonSqueezy checkout URL
On WebView close, refresh subscription status from GET /api/users/me
userStories.notes: Use react-native-webview. Checkout URLs from backend config. Plans: Free, 6.99€/mois Premium, 12.99€/mois Premium+.
